canonical_name: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana

local_names.ta: பிரதான் மந்திரி ஜீவன் ஜோதி பீமா யோஜனா
local_names.te: ప్రధాన మంత్రి జీవన్ జ్యోతి బీమా యోజన
local_names.kn: ಪ್ರಧಾನ ಮಂತ್ರಿ ಜೀವನ ಜ್ಯೋತಿ ಬೀಮಾ ಯೋಜನೆ
local_names.ml: പ്രധാൻ മന്ത്രി ജീവൻ ജ്യോതി ബീമ യോജന
local_names.pa: ਪ੍ਰਧਾਨ ਮੰਤਰੀ ਜੀਵਨ ਜੋਤੀ ਬੀਮਾ ਯੋਜਨਾ
local_names.or: ପ୍ରଧାନ ମନ୍ତ୍ରୀ ଜୀବନ ଜ୍ୟୋତି ବୀମା ଯୋଜନା

exclusion_rules.description: Only individuals aged 18 to 50 years can enroll. Coverage continues until age 55 if enrolled before 50.
Must have an active savings bank account for auto-debit of annual premium of Rs 436
Can enroll through only ONE savings bank account even if multiple accounts exist
Policy lapses if Rs 436 annual premium is not auto-debited by May 31 of each year

family_criteria.family_definition: Individual scheme — each person must enroll separately with their own bank account. Not a family floater. Multiple family members can each enroll independently.

covered_procedures: Death due to any cause (accidental or non-accidental): Rs 2 lakh lump sum to nominee
excluded_procedures: Medical treatment expenses (this is life insurance, NOT health insurance)
Partial death benefit — full Rs 2 lakh or nothing

required_documents.name: Savings Bank Account
required_documents.notes: Active savings account in any scheduled commercial bank, RRB, or cooperative bank. Jan Dhan accounts qualify.

required_documents.name: Aadhaar Card
required_documents.notes: Must be linked to the bank account for auto-debit consent

required_documents.name: Nomination Form
required_documents.notes: Must nominate a beneficiary who will receive Rs 2 lakh claim amount upon death. Available at bank branch.

required_documents.name: Auto-Debit Consent
required_documents.notes: Written consent for Rs 436/year to be auto-debited from bank account between May 25 and May 31 annually

enrollment_channels: Any bank branch (SBI, PNB, BOB, etc.)
Net banking portal of your bank
Mobile banking app of your bank
Bank Mitra / Business Correspondent in villages
enrollment_steps: Step 1: Visit your bank branch or use net banking / mobile banking app
Step 2: Ask for the PMJJBY enrollment form or select PMJJBY option in digital banking
Step 3: Fill the form with personal details, bank account number, and nominee details
Step 4: Provide Aadhaar number for KYC linkage
Step 5: Sign the auto-debit consent for Rs 436/year premium
Step 6: Bank processes the enrollment and Rs 436 is debited from your account
Step 7: Policy certificate generated; coverage period June 1 to May 31 each year
Step 8: Policy auto-renews annually if sufficient balance (Rs 436) maintained in account
description_for_embedding: Pradhan Mantri Jeevan Jyoti Bima Yojana (PMJJBY) is a central government LIFE INSURANCE scheme — NOT a health insurance scheme. It provides Rs 2 lakh to the nominee upon the death of the insured (from any cause, accidental or natural) at an annual premium of just Rs 436, auto-debited from the bank account. Eligibility: any individual aged 18-50 with a savings bank account. It does NOT cover hospitalization, medical treatment, or disability. This is a pure term life cover that complements PMSBY (accident insurance) and PM-JAY (health insurance) but does not replace either.
